parents.subject: LU-13307 nodemap: have nodemap_add_member support large NIDs

commit.subject: LU-15913 tests: add rename stress test via racer (testing)
commit.message:
LU-15913 tests: add rename stress test via racer (testing)

** not for landing, only comparison with unpatched testing **

Add a rename stress test using the racer framework.  Use
mrename if found, to avoid stat and allow directory rename.
Sometimes create and rename files to/from subdirectories.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=racer env=ONLY=2
Test-Parameters: testlist=racer env=ONLY=2 mdtcount=2
Test-Parameters: testlist=racer env=ONLY=2 mdtcount=2
Test-Parameters: testlist=racer env=ONLY=2 mdtcount=2
Test-Parameters: testlist=racer env=ONLY=2 mdtcount=2
Test-Parameters: testlist=racer env=ONLY=2 mdtcount=2
Test-Parameters: testlist=racer env=ONLY=2 mdtcount=2
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I2ae034b864a5ccb8a59bf7028d22cd67c63ebbe5
